organizers.name: Julia Undeutsch
organizers.title: Accessibility Specialist in UX and Development

2026.name: Jane Doe
2026.title: Future of Tech
2026.bio: Jane is a visionary leader in the tech industry with over 15 years of experience.
2026.abstract: In this talk, Jane will explore the emerging trends that are shaping the future of technology and how we can prepare for them.

2026.name: John Smith
2026.title: Accessibility for All
2026.bio: John is an accessibility advocate and developer passionate about making the web usable for everyone.
2026.abstract: Learn practical strategies and tools to ensure your web applications are accessible to users with diverse needs.

2026.name: Alice Wonder
2026.title: Breaking the Pattern in AI
2026.bio: Alice is an AI researcher focused on ethical AI and bias mitigation.
2026.abstract: Discover how we can challenge existing patterns in AI development to create more fair and equitable systems.
